result.stderr:
Usage:
  sih --workflow <path> --env <environment> [--catalog <path>] [--envfile <path>] [--varsfile <path>] [--report-format <json|html|both|none>] [--capture-http <none|headers|bodies>] [--refresh-cache] [--dry-run] [--verbose] [--debug] [--mocked]
  sih report <path-to-json> [--output <dir>] [--no-open]
  sih --version

Run options:
  -w, --workflow  Workflow file to execute.
  -e, --env       Environment key to resolve base url.
  -c, --catalog   Optional catalog path (defaults to embedded catalog).
      --envfile   Optional env file override for the root workflow.
      --varsfile  Optional vars file override (must be .wfvars).
      --report-format  Execution report artifact format: json, html, both, or none.
      --capture-http   Capture level for HTTP details in reports: none, headers, or bodies.
      --refresh-cache  Redownload swagger definitions even if cached.
      --dry-run   Print the execution plan without calling endpoints.
      --verbose   Print detailed plan information.
      --debug     Print stage debug sections before invocation.
      --mocked    Use mock payloads/outputs when defined.
      --no-redact Disable redaction of sensitive headers and payload fields in reports.
      --no-summary Disable the post-execution summary block.

Report options:
  sih report <path>  Generate an interactive HTML trace report from an execution JSON artifact.
  -x, --execution    Path to the .workflow.report.json file (alternative to positional arg).
  -o, --output       Output directory for the HTML file (defaults to same dir as JSON).
      --no-open      Do not open the report in the browser after generation.

Global:
      --version   Print only the CLI version.
  -h, --help      Show this help.

PinedaTec.eu © 2026

commands.payload:
Sphere Integration Hub (SIH) CLI v.1.5.7.126
----------------------------------------------
Usage:
  sih --workflow <path> --env <environment> [--catalog <path>] [--envfile <path>] [--varsfile <path>] [--report-format <json|html|both|none>] [--capture-http <none|headers|bodies>] [--refresh-cache] [--dry-run] [--verbose] [--debug] [--mocked]
  sih report <path-to-json> [--output <dir>] [--no-open]
  sih --version

Run options:
  -w, --workflow  Workflow file to execute.
  -e, --env       Environment key to resolve base url.
  -c, --catalog   Optional catalog path (defaults to embedded catalog).
      --envfile   Optional env file override for the root workflow.
      --varsfile  Optional vars file override (must be .wfvars).
      --report-format  Execution report artifact format: json, html, both, or none.
      --capture-http   Capture level for HTTP details in reports: none, headers, or bodies.
      --refresh-cache  Redownload swagger definitions even if cached.
      --dry-run   Print the execution plan without calling endpoints.
      --verbose   Print detailed plan information.
      --debug     Print stage debug sections before invocation.
      --mocked    Use mock payloads/outputs when defined.
      --no-redact Disable redaction of sensitive headers and payload fields in reports.
      --no-summary Disable the post-execution summary block.

Report options:
  sih report <path>  Generate an interactive HTML trace report from an execution JSON artifact.
  -x, --execution    Path to the .workflow.report.json file (alternative to positional arg).
  -o, --output       Output directory for the HTML file (defaults to same dir as JSON).
      --no-open      Do not open the report in the browser after generation.

Global:
      --version   Print only the CLI version.
  -h, --help      Show this help.

PinedaTec.eu © 2026
